narrative:
Union Township R (precinct in Clermont County) has 822 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
